items.title: AFL matriarch stored guns for Dezi Freeman, helped wife get to Australia

children.content: Kay Reid, the mother of premiership players Ben and Sam Reid, reveals that she and her husband Bruce's deep ties to the dead fugitive and his family date back two decades.

items.title: Global telco escapes penalty for bank scam texts despite customers losing millions

children.content: A global telco that failed to stop more than 1,000 scam text messages from reaching Australians has faced no consequences, the ABC can reveal.

children.content: Scores of drones targeted Moscow overnight in what was Ukraine's largest attack on the Russian capital.

items.title: Hanson's 'scary' parental leave views outdated, advocates say

children.content: Pauline Hanson's openness to discuss a winding back of paid parental leave is concerning and harks back to an Australia that no longer exists, advocates say.

articles.title: An orange bulldozer is ploughing through the political arena

children.content: Four years ago, Australians decided they didn't want a bulldozer for a prime minister. But now if Gina Rinehart has her way, a big orange one will be ploughing her way through the political arena.

articles.title: The 2 minutes and 46 seconds of Pauline Hanson's speech that she thinks matters

children.content: When Pauline Hanson stood up at the National Press Club, it was not just for the audience watching on broadcast TV. In the age of social media, the bite-sized clips that come later are far more important.

items.title: 'Lifeline' or 'catastrophe'? Community divided over proposed data centre

items.title: EV public charger shortage? The data shows drivers rarely queue to charge

items.title: Ancient oak tree linked to the legend of Robin Hood is dead

items.title: Coroner suggests racism marred investigation of Indigenous teen's death

items.title: NT government reveals scale of bungled smart meter rollout

items.title: Sarah Game won't rule out introducing another bill to restrict late term abortion

children.content: Family First upper house MLC Sarah Game has not ruled out introducing another bill restricting late-term abortion access, after her proposed legislation to restrict abortion after 25 weeks failed in the lower house last night.

items.title: Drone footage reveals extent of seal deaths from bird flu on Australian island

children.content: Research has revealed the devastating impact of bird flu on a remote Australian territory where more than 13,000 baby seals are now believed to have been killed by the virus.
